The codebase is at version 0.50 (commit: ce93a6db).

## Issue to Resolve

No spacing around colon in annotation
Spacing should not be allowed around the colon in annotation and annotation entries regardless of the annotation target

```
@file:JvmName("Foo") // allowed
@file :JvmName("Foo") // disallowed
@file: JvmName("Foo") // disallowed
@file : JvmName("Foo") // disallowed

@set:[Inject VisibleForTesting] // allowed
@set :[Inject VisibleForTesting] // disallowed
@set: [Inject VisibleForTesting] // disallowed
@set : [Inject VisibleForTesting] // disallowed
```

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `CHANGELOG.md`
- `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/SpacingAroundColonRule.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

content.text:
The issue was that `SpacingAroundColonRule` explicitly ignored annotations, allowing any spacing around the colon in annotation use-site targets (e.g. `@file : JvmName`).

I modified `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/SpacingAroundColonRule.kt` to enforce no spacing around colons for annotations.

The changes involved:
1.  Removing the early return for `ANNOTATION` and `ANNOTATION_ENTRY`.
2.  Introducing a `removeSpacingAfter` extension property which is true for annotations.
3.  Modifying the logic to respect `removeSpacingAfter`:
    *   Skipping `upsertWhitespaceAfterMe` when `removeSpacingAfter` is true (to avoid adding newline after colon).
    *   Excluding `missingSpacingAfter` check when `removeSpacingAfter` is true (to avoid adding space after colon).
    *   Adding a specific check for `Unexpected spacing after ":"` when `removeSpacingAfter` is true.

I verified the changes by creating a temporary test file `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/test/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/SpacingAroundColonRuleAnnotationTest.kt` with test cases covering various spacing scenarios for annotations. I confirmed that the tests initially failed (due to assertions) and then passed after applying the fix. I also ran the existing tests to ensure no regressions. I deleted the temporary test file before finishing.

Summary of changes:
- `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/SpacingAroundColonRule.kt`: Updated logic to handle annotation spacing.

The rule now correctly disallows:
```kotlin
@file :JvmName("Foo")
@file: JvmName("Foo")
@file : JvmName("Foo")
```
And auto-corrects them to:
```kotlin
@file:JvmName("Foo")
```
